query_title: Christman in London - God Save the Queen

recommendations.title: L'agenzia dei bugiardi
recommendations.overview: Fred works for a company that creates alibis for cheaters until Clio, the daughter of one of his client, falls in love with him.

recommendations.title: Help! My In-Laws Are Vampires!
recommendations.overview: A loving young couple discover they're expecting a child, but the man isn't too keen on introducing her girlfriend to his family. Is it because he has a vampire father, a witch mother, a ghostly grandma, and a zombie uncle?

recommendations.title: Come tu mi vuoi
recommendations.overview: Giada is a overachieving student who works to pay for college. Riccardo is a spoiled brat who answers her tutoring ad in order to improve his abysmal grades. She's shy and homely. He's handsome and brazen. As they say, opposites attract.

recommendations.title: Natale Col Boss
recommendations.overview: Alex and Dino are two enstablished plastic surgeons used to change their patients' physical aspect with a few cuts of scalpel. Leo and Cosimo are two clumsy cops on the trails of a powerful and dangerous boss of which no one knows the face. All these

recommendations.title: The Favourite
recommendations.overview: England, early 18th century. The close relationship between Queen Anne and Sarah Churchill is threatened by the arrival of Sarah's cousin, Abigail Hill, resulting in a bitter rivalry between the two cousins to be the Queen's favourite.

recommendations.title: Two Is a Family
recommendations.overview: A man without attachments or responsibilities suddenly finds himself with an abandoned baby and leaves for London to try and find the mother. Eight years later after he and his daughter become inseparable Gloria's mother reappears.

recommendations.title: Emma.
recommendations.overview: In 1800s England, a well-meaning but selfish young woman meddles in the love lives of her friends.

recommendations.title: White Men Can't Jump
recommendations.overview: Two street basketball hustlers try to con each other, then team up for a bigger score.

recommendations.title: Downton Abbey
recommendations.overview: The beloved Crawleys and their intrepid staff prepare for the most important moment of their lives. A royal visit from the King and Queen of England will unleash scandal, romance and intrigue that will leave the future of Downton hanging in the balan

recommendations.title: Northanger Abbey
recommendations.overview: A young woman's penchant for sensational Gothic novels leads to misunderstandings in the matters of the heart.
